documentation.text: @dev Create agreement and fund escrow. Buyer sends ETH with this call.

@dev Confirm delivery and release payment to supplier.
 Only when shipment status is Delivered (3) in SupplyChain contract.

devdoc.details: Escrow-style payment: buyer deposits funds; release to supplier only after delivery confirmation. Integrated with SupplyChain contract for delivery verification.
devdoc.title: SupplyChainPayment
